summary: Completed frontend testing for KBS8 Platform redesign (AdminLayout, ClientLayout, LoginPage). All features working correctly including login page with role tabs, admin dashboard with new sidebar structure (CRM, Delivery, Product, Content sections with collapsible CMS groups), CMS Hub page with 4 sections, client dashboard with new sections (Proyek, Discovery, Komunikasi), and logout functionality for both admin and client portals.
passed_tests: Login page UI with role tabs (Client/Staff/Admin) - all tabs clickable and helper text changes correctly
Admin login with admin@kubus.id / Admin#2026 - successfully redirects to /portal/admin
Admin sidebar displays new sections: CRM, Delivery, Product, Content with collapsible groups
CMS collapsible groups: Website (expanded by default with Layanan, Cases, etc.), Komponen UI, Showcase, Media
CMS Hub page at /portal/admin/cms displays 4 sections: Website Pages (9), Komponen UI (3), Showcase (2), Media (1)
Admin logout functionality - redirects to login page
Client login with client@kubus.id / Client#2026 - successfully redirects to /portal/dashboard
Client sidebar displays new sections: Proyek (Proyek Saya, Invoice), Discovery (Assessment), Komunikasi (Pesan, AI Assistant)
Client logout functionality - redirects to login page
